MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Space Pirates
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Fearless pirate raiders scour the stars, seeking vast fortunes as they attack and salvage without mercy.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: The Factorum
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: The creators of Prototech. They've returned from the edge of known space to seek revenge.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Unknown
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Space is vast. As humans push into the void of space, sometimes the void pushes back. Danger, mystery, or reward may lie ahead.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Intergalactic Miners Guild
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Finest ore and purest gases. Nothing but the best for our customers.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: First Class Prospectors
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: For the highest grade of minerals and gases come visit us.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Independent Merchants
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Components, Munitions, Tools, and Fuel. You name it. Become a partner for the best offers, we will make it worth your while.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Rogue Technologies
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Our partners deliver us the highest quality components, tools, gases and contracts. From the outer regions of space directly to you.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Secret Hauling Services
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: We deliver durable components and the best quality tools. Our services include fuel, oxygen and contracts from reliable partners.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Clang Inventors
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Top manufacturer of ships for the best prices. We offer excellent service that fit your needs.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: United Welders
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Cutting edge technologies bring you the best quality through our shipyards, delivering competitive advantage to you over your competitors.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Galactic Makers
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: Number one producer of vehicles for industrial, military, mining and exploration aplications.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Independent Infiltration
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: We promise high-class weapons, affordable ammunition, and our guaranteed discretion on all transactions.

MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Name: Sacred Infantry
MyObjectBuilder_Faction.Description: You can't put a price tag on peace of mind. We have rifles, pistols, ammunition, and all other security needs.

Questlog.Title: Prepare to Leave the Escape Pod
